zh.Nantwich, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾南特維其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Fouleshurst II於1397年出生在英國英格蘭爾南特維其時，他的父親Thomas de Fouleshurst31歲，母親Eva de Venables31歲。他於1419年與Cecily Mainwaring在英國英格蘭爾切斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1439年6月24日在英國英格蘭爾可維享年42歲。

zh-hans.Nantwich, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾南特維其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Fouleshurst II于1397年出生在英国英格兰爾南特維其时，他的父亲Thomas de Fouleshurst31岁，母亲Eva de Venables31岁。他于1419年与Cecily Mainwaring在英国英格兰爾切斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1439年6月24日在英国英格兰爾可維享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Fouleshurst II was born in 1397, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Fouleshurst, was 31 and his mother, Eva de Venables, was 31. He married Cecily Mainwaring in 1419, in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 24 June 1439, in Crewe, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Fouleshurst II est né en 1397, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Fouleshurst, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Eva de Venables, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Cecily Mainwaring en 1419, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 24 juin 1439, à Crewe, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Fouleshurst II 1397 in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Fouleshurst 31 und seine Mutter Eva de Venables 31. Er hat 1419 in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Cecily Mainwaring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Juni 1439 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Crewe, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Fouleshurst II è nato il nel 1397 nel Nantwich, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas de Fouleshurst, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Eva de Venables, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Cecily Mainwaring nel 1419, nel Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 24 giugno 1439, nel Crewe, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Fouleshurst IIが1397年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチで生まれた時，父Thomas de Fouleshurstは31歳，母Eva de Venablesは31歳であった。1419年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターでCecily Mainwaringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1439年6月24日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアクレウで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Fouleshurst II(이)가 1397년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 난트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Fouleshurst(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva de Venables(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 Cecily Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1439년 6월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 크레베에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Fouleshurst II nasceu em 1397, em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Fouleshurst, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Eva de Venables, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily Mainwaring em 1419, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Fouleshurst II родился в 1397 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas de Fouleshurst было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Eva de Venables, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily Mainwaring в 1419 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 24 июня 1439 г. в местности крю, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Fouleshurst II nació en 1397, en Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Fouleshurst, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Eva de Venables, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Cecily Mainwaring en 1419, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 24 de junio de 1439, en Crewe, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años.
